ValidationRule.description: RO-2858 — Prevents editing any partner fields on Closed Won or Closed Lost opportunities. Only System Administrator can override.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Won"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost") ), OR( ISCHANGED(Partner_Basis_AE__c), ISCHANGED(Base_AE__c), ISCHANGED(Boost_AE__c), ISCHANGED(Partner_Kickback_3_AE__c), ISCHANGED(Base_Volume__c), ISCHANGED(Boost_Volume__c), ISCHANGED(Partner_Kickback_Threshold_3__c), ISCHANGED(Partner_Current_AE__c), ISCHANGED(Partner_Contract_Start_Date__c), ISCHANGED(Partner_Contract_End_Date__c) ), $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Partner fields cannot be modified on closed opportunities. Please contact the Salesforce team.
